description_long: This is a sturdy outdoor bench featuring a seat and backrest made from three wide, brown wooden planks, each fastened with visible metal bolts. The bench is supported by a robust black metal frame, with two straight legs on each side and additional crossbars for stability. The seat planks are slightly curved at the edges, providing ergonomic comfort for users. The backrest is upright and parallel to the seat, offering ample support for the back. The overall design is utilitarian and durable, suitable for public spaces such as parks, sidewalks, or bus stops. The materials and construction suggest it is built to withstand frequent use and exposure to the elements.
description: A brown wooden slat bench with a black metal frame and upright backrest, designed for outdoor public use. The bench is sturdy, ergonomic, and features visible metal fasteners.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three horizontal wooden slats of the backrest and seat, with black metal legs and crossbars visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the upright backrest, and the thickness of the wooden planks.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the wooden slats and the supporting black metal frame structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the seat and backrest alignment.
attribute_leg_design: two straight black metal legs with crossbars
